CookieConsent.message: This site uses cookies. By continuing to browse the site, you agree to our use of cookies. For more information, visit “Settings”.
CookieConsent.modalDescription: We use cookies to provide a better privacy-conscious experience. Choose which types of cookies you allow.

essential.title: Essential
essential.description: These cookies are required for the site’s core functionality and cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how the site is used and how we can improve the experience.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: These cookies are used for more relevant communication and advertising.
